ddls:
CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the survey was completed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the respondent */,
  "feeling_sad_tearful" TEXT /* Whether the respondent feels sad or tearful */,
  "irritable_towards_baby_partner" TEXT /* Whether the respondent feels irritable towards the baby and partner */,
  "trouble_sleeping" TEXT /* Frequency of trouble sleeping at night */,
  "problems_concentrating_making_decision" TEXT /* Whether the respondent has problems concentrating or making decisions */,
  "overeating_loss_of_appetite" TEXT /* Whether the respondent experiences overeating or loss of appetite */,
  "feeling_anxious" TEXT /* Whether the respondent feels anxious */,
  "feeling_of_guilt" TEXT /* Whether the respondent feels guilty */,
  "problems_bonding_with_baby" TEXT /* Whether the respondent has problems bonding with the baby */,
  "suicide_attempt" TEXT /* Whether the respondent has attempted suicide */,
  "survey_interval" TEXT /* Time interval at which the survey was completed */,
  "parity" INTEGER /* Number of live births the respondent has had */,
  "gestational_age" TEXT /* Gestational age at delivery */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery */,
  "postpartum_complications" TEXT /* Postpartum complications experienced */,
  "support_system" TEXT /* Description of the support system */,
  "prior_mental_health_issues" TEXT /* History of mental health issues before pregnancy */,
  "current_medication" TEXT /* Current medication being taken */,
  "intervention_received" TEXT /* Any interventions received for mental health issues */,
  "satisfaction_with_care" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with the care received */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes from the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each survey response
Unique identifier for each respondent
